learnerValue: Accurately rehearses the full hybridoma-production sequence.
Distractors target distinct errors about cell roles, mixed hybridomas, and single-cell cloning.
Tests the supported IVF sequence from hormone treatment through embryo transfer.
Distractors diagnose errors in hormone timing, fertilisation location, and transfer timing.
Combines thyroxine's two stated roles with its negative-feedback control.
Distractors isolate three plausible misconceptions without introducing unsupported content.
Requires accurate mapping of all specified uses to auxins, ethene, and gibberellins.
The three distractors represent distinct pairwise hormone-use confusions.
Tests both the listed environmental variables and the possible forms of change.
Distractors target overrestriction to human causes and omission of atmospheric gas composition.
